ai_summary:
I have analyzed the changes since your last visit.

Overall NPS has improved to 85.15, reflecting a positive shift of 2 points. The most significant gain was observed in TP6 Booking of Package Experience, which surged by 48.49 points to an NPS of 66.67. However, the SOUTH (Region) - SHX (Location) - GND (Branch) experienced the steepest decline, dropping 33.33 points to an NPS of 66.67.

Key customer concerns include delivery issues, with multiple reports of packages not reaching customers and poor service interactions. Notably, several verbatims indicate churn risk, especially regarding delivery failures and unresponsive staff. To sustain this positive momentum, addressing these critical issues is essential.
